title: When will changes in templates automatically update boards created from that template?
excerpt: It is incredibly frustrating that when I update my template that it doesn’t update boards created from that template. When is this going to happen? I have over 80 projects that are built off of a template and currently I…

posts.author: Beesbythesea (Beesbythesea)
posts.cookedHtml: It is incredibly frustrating that when I update my template that it doesn’t update boards created from that template. When is this going to happen? I have over 80 projects that are built off of a template and currently I need to manually update each one when there is a change. This is ridiculous.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Beesbythesea!

I hear where you’re coming from and understand that there is certainly a need for this feature. I have followed up internally with our product team and will circle back here once I get a response.

That said, in the meantime, I believe that this app in our apps marketplace might work for you?

Screen Shot 2023-03-06 at 11.47.03 am634×714 60.6 KB

You can check out a run through here: Bulker App Demo - monday.com marketplace app - YouTube

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Slack

posts.author: Beesbythesea (Beesbythesea)
posts.cookedHtml: Appreciate it, but I already have 80 boards built from my template, so I don’t need to create new boards and it isn’t clear if I’m able to add my existing boards (doesn’t seem to work).

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: My apologies you’re correct, this app is specific for those boards that you’re creating from scratch. That being said, I have heard back from our developer team who have confirmed that dynamic filtering is currently in its planning stages, with an aim to have a release timeline in place by the end of this Q

posts.author: Boiker (Brendon)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @BiancaT
How are we travelling on this one, the reason I ask is because I have to deploy our template to all customer records (folders) and a bit apprehensive about doing this before this change is implemented. Thanks

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @Boiker - no update as of yet, but I will follow up and let you know if the developers can share any more details on this

posts.author: gtaveras (Gabriela Taveras)
posts.cookedHtml: Do you know if this app will allow you to duplicate automation rules when a group has been templated out?

posts.author: Lucie (Lucie)
posts.cookedHtml: Any updates yet?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Lucie - I reached out yesterday on the status of this development. I hope to have an update by end of week

posts.author: ECO_Blair (Blair Cole)
posts.cookedHtml: Good afternoon, I see this feature request has been discussed in many places for a long time. Has there been any updates?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Blair and Lucie,

I hear you both and recognise the need for this feature. I have chased developers on this and I am afraid they are unable to commit to a release timeline due to a focus on higher severity platform issues and updates - I totally understand this isn’t the ideal response, however please be assured that I will continue advocating for this and relay updates when they’re shared.

posts.author: justinetae (Justine Wiklo)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi there, I’m just checking on the status of this, as I have a number of changes to a template that will need to be carried out across over 20 boards. I’d love to not have to spend hours on this!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Justine,

I totally understand where you’re coming from. At this stage, I can confirm that this feature is on our roadmap, however I cannot provide a specific eta at this point, you can keep an eye on the status of the feature request via this link → Set Board as MASTER Board (Column Structure, Permissions, and Automations Applied Across Linked Boards)

posts.author: lmoore (Lana Moore)
posts.cookedHtml:
Potential New User here. Testing the waters today.
One of the first must haves I realized I would need is some kind of auto update project boards based on the standing template. Realized this was not happening and found this thread. Is there some kind of ETA on this?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Lana,

Welcome to the Community

As for an ETA, you can find all updates related to this feature on the existing feature request. We recently updated the thread and communicated an estimated release of 2024. We will continue providing updates as soon as they’re shared with us - thank you for your patience

posts.author: rachel.seweryniak (Rachel Seweryniak)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, any further updates on this? We want to use a template, but it would be effective for over 2,000 clients, and I need to know we will have functionality to update boards. thanks!

posts.author: JennyyyB (Jenny)
posts.cookedHtml: Really hoping this is still on track! I’ve seen it in a couple of 3rd party tutorial videos but cannot figure out how to make one on my Pro account… not sure why some have this feature and others do not. My company just made the switch to Monday and are finding it very difficult to get this all rolled out quickly because we do not want to have to remake all of our client boards in a couple months, as we continue to learn and grow with this platform. Any updates would be great!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Jenny!

I totally hear you and can confirm this is definitely still on track with updates expected to be communicated in the next couple months - stay tuned

posts.author: JennyyyB (Jenny)
posts.cookedHtml:
I appreciate your response! Unfortunately, a couple months from now won’t help us now, and I also learned that this feature will only be offered on the Enterprise plan… which is not affordable for a small businesses like mine that has only a few employees but juggles several yearly clients. I read on some older posts there were 3rd party integrations we could add to have this feature added to our plan, but I’m not finding any that exist anymore.

Respectfully, this is something your community has been asking for for 4 years now. I’m starting to lose confidence that this platform will listen to their customers and make this necessary feature available for everyone, despite the communications that it “will be in a couple months”.

posts.author: JayBurtt (Jay Burtt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Bianca,

What steps can the community take to express how important this is and to raise the priority on this topic? Do we need to start a campaign to get others to attach themselves to this feature? Seeing in the comments that this goes back 4 years is a bit concerning to new users who really need this feature. There was also a comment I saw somewhere that this would only be available on Enterprise - if so then this feature will never be available to my team.

posts.author: Priska (Priska)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Bianca,

Are there any updates on this?

The company I am working in is starting to migrate from Clickup to Monday.com. We have a team of 40-50 handling over 100 projects a month. Manually adjusting the templates every time there is a change will be tedious. This might take us off of Monday.com to find another solution elsewhere.

posts.author: Timyth (Tim Schaeppi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Not sure what’s going on here - the App itself indicates this functionality is available and working currently. The banner at the top says all future updates will be applied to boards made from the template, but I just tried changing some status selections and column names and they did not propagate to the boards that were created from the template. What’s the truth here?

image1332×185 18.2 KB

posts.author: dnmonday (Desmond)
posts.cookedHtml:
Just being pedantic, but this functionality is not in place yet.
The keyword you’re mixing up is that changes are applied to ALL FUTURE BOARDS CREATED
So only boards created from that point on will reflect the latest published template.

All that to say, bumping this thread as this is a function desperately needing priority

posts.author: Timyth (Tim Schaeppi)
posts.cookedHtml: Yikes, that is poorly worded to the point of being deceptive. They either don’t have proofreaders on staff, or are trying to posture as if the functionality is already there. Does the basic premise of a “template” really need its own banner at the top? Hahaha I just don’t understand them.

posts.author: jade.woodward (Jade)
posts.cookedHtml: Any update on this one please? Super super important for us - over 100 boards which I manually update each time we add/remove something. Going to need a new full time person just to do this if it’s not sorted soon

posts.author: Scheerer (Mike Scheerer)
posts.cookedHtml:
A long time has now passed since this requirement was initially aired and there still does not appear to be any update as to when the ability to Auto-update existing boards created with a template feature will be implemented.

This is a basic feature that should have been available, adding a single new task to multiple boards is just un-tenable and I agree with many others here that this should be available.

posts.author: jmosinski (Joe Mosinski)
posts.cookedHtml: Any update on this?

posts.author: CarmenR (Carmen)
posts.cookedHtml:
I don’t have time to join the Elevate session because I have to manually update all boards created using templates, since changes on the template don’t automatically apply to boards.
ALSO came here to say that the bug where only SOME automations carry across from templates to boards needs to be fixed.
CHAT BOT doesn’t understand these issues…

All good and well holding exciting Elevate updates every couple of months, but please do take these forums into account too?
Thanks!

posts.author: davidatalix (David)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Bianca!

Any updates on this?

posts.author: Jacquids (Jacqui)
posts.cookedHtml: Popping in to add my vote that this is desperately needed. I’m holding off on creating boards and templates because this feature is not available.
